DISCOVERY 612, EDWARD C. FISCH, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, STREAMLINE ENTERPRISES, LLC. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY AGAINST DEFENDANT AUTO BENEFITS CORPORATION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. DEFENDANT AUTO BENEFITS CORPORATION'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT AUTO BENEFITS CORPORATION IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. Gregory M. Gentile, Esq., Ropers Majeski Kohn Bentley (415) 543-4800 Moving To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendants Streamline Enterprises, LLC, Macinnis and Auto Benefits Corporation

NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. HEARING HELD. ROPERS, MAJESKI, KOHN & BENTLEY'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANTS STREAMLINE ENTERPRISES, LLC, J. PETER MACINNIS, G.
